title: [Epic] Comms datalink encryption upgrade — AES-256-GCM
text:
Epic KES-201. Reporter: Priya Nair (Comms/Datalink Engineer). Assignee: Priya Nair. Status: Done. Priority: High. Created: 2025-01-10. Resolved: 2025-03-01.

Description: End-to-end AES-256-GCM encryption for the K-200 command and telemetry datalink, required by customer contract security addendum (ref KES-203) by milestone M4 (March 2025).

Background: December 2024 penetration test (MD-SEC-2024-11) found the unencrypted FreeWave P-1125 datalink vulnerable to command injection. This epic covers the hardware (P-1127 FPGA encryption module), the radio upgrade (P-1125 → P-1126 for bandwidth headroom), the firmware implementation (SRC-018), the GCS protocol stack update (SRC-024), and the ICD updates (DOC-471, DOC-472).

Design review: WIKI-071 (Comms Encryption Upgrade Review, 2025-01-22).
ECR: ECR-229. ECN: ECN-322 (approved 2025-02-05).

Sub-stories: KES-203 (AES-256 implementation), KES-203 contract requirement story.
